message:
fix(checkpoint): add hash-chain tamper detection with monotonic progress enforcement

verify_chain now tracks last_valid_id and last_valid_progress (epoch +
iteration) with a checkpoint_progress_violation helper detecting epoch
regression, iteration regression within an epoch, and duplicate logical
position. Once a chain failure is detected, all subsequent records are
marked prior_hash_chain_failure.

save_checkpoint refuses to append to a chain with existing violations
(via first_hash_chain_failure helper) and rejects non-monotonic
epoch/iteration values before writing. Tests cover append-after-tamper,
iteration regression, duplicate position, suffix records after failure,
and chain recovery to last-valid checkpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
